concerns.text: Task T082 is marked unchecked (missing implementation). It requires generating `data/processed/crosslinker_sensitivity_report.csv` and validating it in `main.py` to satisfy FR-008. Without this task, the sensitivity analysis requirement is unimplemented.

Task T085 is marked unchecked (missing implementation). It requires generating `data/processed/data_source_verification_report.json` to satisfy Plan Phase 0 and 1.3. Without this, the data gap analysis reporting is incomplete.

Task T041-SHIFT (Sensitivity Validation Gate) is marked unchecked. It is required to validate the output of T041 and halt on unstable proxies, satisfying Plan Phase 1.7 and FR-008. Its absence leaves the validation logic unimplemented.

Tasks T086-P0 through T086-P5 (Phase Gate checks) are all marked unchecked. These are required to enforce the strict phase progression defined in Plan.md (Phase 0 through Phase 5). Without them, the pipeline lacks the mandatory blocking gates described in the plan.

Task T060-REV is marked unchecked. While T060/T061 exist, T060-REV (Automated Verification Loop) is explicitly listed as a replacement for T101 and addresses Plan Phase 0. Its unchecked status suggests the loop logic is not yet implemented.

Task T023-DOC is marked unchecked. It is required to document the conditional heuristic mapping protocol in `docs/decision_log.md` to satisfy Plan Phase 1.3 and Constitution Principle VII. The documentation is missing.
